title: Navigate to a URL
description: Learn how to navigate to a webpage using Playwright's page.goto() method
instructions:
Write a Playwright test that:
1. Navigates to https://playwright.dev
2. Waits for the page to load
3. Verifies the title contains 'Playwright'

starterCode.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect
import re

    # TODO: Navigate to https://playwright.dev
    
    # TODO: Get the page title
    
    # TODO: Assert title contains 'Playwright'
    pass

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect
import re

def test_navigate_url(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://playwright.dev')
    title = page.title()
    assert 'Playwright' in title

hints: Use await page.goto(url) to navigate to a page
Use await page.title() to get the page title
Remember to use async/await with Playwright methods

testCases.name: Page loads successfully
testCases.expectedBehavior: Page loads without errors and returns 200 status
